input.contract: {"goal":"Generate the monthly invoice batch","acceptanceCriteria":[{"text":"Every active subscription gets exactly one invoice","blocking":true,"verification":"invoice-count reconciliation"}],"inputs":[{"name":"subscriptions","required":true,"source":"billing db"}],"sideEffects":[{"name":"invoice creation","approval":true}],"reportSpec":"batch summary"}

metadata.criterion: A missing output spec is flagged as an error.
Missing goal and missing criteria are both flagged; score reflects two failed checks.

input.contract: {"goal":"Send churn-risk SMS alerts","outputSpec":"SMS sent to at-risk users","acceptanceCriteria":[{"text":"Only opted-in users receive SMS","blocking":true,"verification":"opt-in filter test"}],"inputs":[{"name":"users","required":true,"source":"crm"}],"sideEffects":["sends sms"],"reportSpec":"alert log"}

metadata.criterion: Plain-string side effects cannot declare an approval gate, so the checker flags them instead of silently passing.

input.contract: {"goal":"Rotate stale API keys","outputSpec":"All keys older than 90 days rotated","acceptanceCriteria":[{"text":"No service loses access during rotation","blocking":true,"verification":"canary health checks"}],"inputs":[{"name":"keyInventory","required":true,"source":"vault"}],"sideEffects":[{"name":"key rotation","approval":true}]}

metadata.criterion: A missing report spec is informational, not an error.
